message:
fix(fr-command): INFO memory + persistence emit upstream-aligned fields [bd-frankenredis-infomemory]

Adds 25+ INFO memory fields and 6 INFO persistence fields that
upstream Redis 7.2 server.c::genRedisInfoString emits but fr was
omitting. All zero-valued placeholders for fields fr does not
yet track:

INFO memory:
  + allocator_active / _allocated / _resident
  + allocator_frag_ratio / _frag_bytes
  + allocator_rss_ratio / _rss_bytes
  + rss_overhead_ratio / _bytes
  + mem_fragmentation_bytes
  + mem_not_counted_for_evict
  + mem_replication_backlog
  + mem_total_replication_buffers
  + mem_clients_slaves / _normal
  + mem_cluster_links
  + mem_aof_buffer
  + total_system_memory / _human
  + used_memory_lua / _lua_human
  + used_memory_vm_eval / _scripts_eval / _vm_functions / _vm_total*
  + number_of_cached_scripts
  + number_of_functions / _libraries
  + used_memory_functions / _scripts / _scripts_human
  + maxmemory_reservation* / _desired*

INFO persistence:
  + aof_rewrites
  + aof_rewrites_consecutive_failures
  + module_fork_in_progress
  + module_fork_last_cow_size
  + rdb_last_load_keys_expired
  + rdb_last_load_keys_loaded

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
